steps.title: Compute the y-intercept
steps.content: $f(0)=-\tfrac{1}{4}$, so the intercept is $(0,-\tfrac{1}{4})$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice A, $(0,-\frac{1}{4})$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
